title: Ghastly resourcepack
description: Hi, I'm creating my own resource pack - it's free. I'm working on it alone, so it might take some time to release. The textures will be 64x64, and once it's released, there will be versions with POM and PBR. Thanks for downloading!
body: In my resource pack, the default 16x textures have been changed to 64x. With this resource pack, you can enjoy the game even more. This is the regular version of my resource pack, which will also be available in POM and PBR versions.
